sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14324" key="a)poxrw/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποχρώννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n14324.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀποχραίνειν</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.129</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
